'''rofakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zombieish|zombieish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-f-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zombieish|zombieish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rofakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rofakithi|rofakithi]] || [[word:rofakiji|rofakiji]] || [[word:rofakishi|rofakishi]] || [[word:rofakiki|rofakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rofakuthuthu|rofakuthuthu]] || [[word:rofakujuju|rofakujuju]] || [[word:rofakushushu|rofakushushu]] || [[word:rofakukuku|rofakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rofakuthu|rofakuthu]] || [[word:rofakuju|rofakuju]] || [[word:rofakushu|rofakushu]] || [[word:rofakuku|rofakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rofakufthuf|rofakufthuf]] || [[word:rofakufjuf|rofakufjuf]] || [[word:rofakufshuf|rofakufshuf]] || [[word:rofakufkuf|rofakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rofakethe|rofakethe]] || [[word:rofakeje|rofakeje]] || [[word:rofakeshe|rofakeshe]] || [[word:rofakeke|rofakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rofakothotho|rofakothotho]] || [[word:rofakojojo|rofakojojo]] || [[word:rofakoshosho|rofakoshosho]] || [[word:rofakokoko|rofakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rofakotho|rofakotho]] || [[word:rofakojo|rofakojo]] || [[word:rofakosho|rofakosho]] || [[word:rofakoko|rofakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rofakofthof|rofakofthof]] || [[word:rofakofjof|rofakofjof]] || [[word:rofakofshof|rofakofshof]] || [[word:rofakofkof|rofakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rofakÃŸfthÃŸf|rofakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rofakÃŸfjÃŸf|rofakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rofakÃŸfshÃŸf|rofakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rofakÃŸfkÃŸf|rofakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rofakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|rofakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rofakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|rofakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rofakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|rofakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rofakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|rofakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rofakÃŸfthÃŸf|rofakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rofakÃŸfjÃŸf|rofakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rofakÃŸfshÃŸf|rofakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rofakÃŸfkÃŸf|rofakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rofakÃŸfthÃŸf|rofakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rofakÃŸfjÃŸf|rofakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rofakÃŸfshÃŸf|rofakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rofakÃŸfkÃŸf|rofakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rofakÃḊthÃḊ|rofakÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:rofakÃḊjÃḊ|rofakÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:rofakÃḊshÃḊ|rofakÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:rofakÃḊkÃḊ|rofakÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rofakathatha|rofakathatha]] || [[word:rofakajaja|rofakajaja]] || [[word:rofakashasha|rofakashasha]] || [[word:rofakakaka|rofakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rofakatha|rofakatha]] || [[word:rofakaja|rofakaja]] || [[word:rofakasha|rofakasha]] || [[word:rofakaka|rofakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rofakafthaf|rofakafthaf]] || [[word:rofakafjaf|rofakafjaf]] || [[word:rofakafshaf|rofakafshaf]] || [[word:rofakafkaf|rofakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:rofakasha|rofakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:rofakshÃḋsha|rofakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rofakrosha|rofakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rofakmusha|rofakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:rofakyasha|rofakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorofaknkshÃḋsha|gorofaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorofaknkrosha|gorofaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorofaknkmusha|gorofaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorofaknkyasha|gorofaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:rofafakasha|rofafakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rofafakshÃḋsha|rofafakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rofafakrosha|rofafakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rofafakmusha|rofafakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rofafakyasha|rofafakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorofafaknkshÃḋsha|gorofafaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorofafaknkrosha|gorofafaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorofafaknkmusha|gorofafaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorofafaknkyasha|gorofafaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:refÃḊkasha|refÃḊkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:refÃḊkshÃḋsha|refÃḊkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:refÃḊkrosha|refÃḊkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:refÃḊkmusha|refÃḊkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:refÃḊkyasha|refÃḊkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorefÃḊknkshÃḋsha|gorefÃḊknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorefÃḊknkrosha|gorefÃḊknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorefÃḊknkmusha|gorefÃḊknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorefÃḊknkyasha|gorefÃḊknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:rofakasha|rofakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rofakshÃḋsha|rofakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rofakrosha|rofakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rofakmusha|rofakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rofakyasha|rofakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorofaknkshÃḋsha|gorofaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorofaknkrosha|gorofaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorofaknkmusha|gorofaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorofaknkyasha|gorofaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
